_comment: Pre-S27a policies that don't reference public.get_staff_role() but are intentionally so. New policies (added in S27a or later) must either follow the get_staff_role() envelope rule OR explicitly add the inline marker '-- rls-allow: <reason>' on the line immediately above the CREATE POLICY. Adding entries to this file is reserved for the legacy backfill — do not add new policies here.
